rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: LSASS Running Under Non-Privileged User Context (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: LSASS Running Under Non-Privileged User Context (RedCanary Threat Detection
  Report)
id: c6624640-de9d-4933-a3dd-261cdeafdd18
status: experimental
description: 'Detects instances of LSASS running under any non-privileged user context,
  which can indicate abuse.

  Part of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.

  '
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/lsass-memory/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.credential_access
- attack.t1003.001
logsource:
  product: windows
  service: security
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 4688
    NewProcessName|endswith: \lsass.exe
  filter:
    SubjectUserSid: S-1-5-18
  condition: selection and not filter
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
